blurb: The conversational buyer-desk surfaces: a two-pane AI chat thread with a hand-noted desk panel, the message-bubble primitives that thread is built from, and the creator XRS resonance-scoring panel with its live ingest log and animated score ring.

components.name: Chat thread
components.blurb: Two-pane AI buyer desk: a scrolling chat log with a suggestion-chip row on the left, and a live hand-written 'desk notes' panel on the right that the agent annotates as the conversation proceeds.
components.html: ✎ Desk notes — listening

components.name: Message bubbles
components.blurb: Static one-off instances documenting the bubble primitives: an agent message (avatar + bubble), a user message (.msg.me, reversed with yellow bubble), and an animated three-dot typing indicator. These render purely from the orbital CSS without any JS.
components.html:
N
Hey — Nova here, your desk for today. No forms, promise. What are we trying to move?
You
Sell a product drop
N

components.name: XRS score ring + ingest
components.blurb: Creator qualify panel: a handle input + Run button that streams a simulated ingest log line-by-line into .ingest, then draws an animated XRS resonance score ring (SVG circle stroke-dashoffset) plus an estimated booking range into the score-card container.
components.html:
Check your handle

Enter any public handle. We simulate the ingest your profile would get on the live exchange.

XRS™ Resonance

One number for how hard your audience actually listens — reply rate, audience penetration, consistency of reach, sentiment quality. Run your handle and your score draws here.
